name: kyw-dev
description: Spec-driven development workflows for durable docs, verified Tasks, and audits.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, execute, and audit spec-driven work.
interface.longDescription: Provides explicit workflows to initialize durable project truth, execute one verified Task at a time, and independently audit the resulting evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use $kyw-init to initialize this repository's durable documents.
Use $kyw-task to create and execute one verified Task.
